factual_core: CC0 core music metadata can support artist, release, recording, and relation candidates without importing lyrics.
short_intro: Review-only external metadata seed for expanding structured culture coverage.

conversation_moves.overview: Use music.chinese_pop_general only as reviewed metadata ingredients, not as final prose.
conversation_moves.works_list: List only concrete titles present in reviewed cards; otherwise say the metadata is incomplete.
conversation_moves.representative_works: Separate representative status from mere metadata presence.
conversation_moves.entry_path: Offer a bounded entry route from reviewed people, works, periods, or movements.
conversation_moves.explain_work: Explain using metadata, relation edges, themes, and context; do not quote source text.
conversation_moves.compare: Compare both sides with an explicit axis and avoid one-sided collapse.
conversation_moves.country_relation: Relate country, language, institution, and period only when reviewed metadata supports it.
conversation_moves.why_it_matters: State significance as a bounded interpretation, not as a memorized source sentence.
conversation_moves.quote_or_lyrics_boundary: Do not provide lyrics, long quotations, or raw source text; summarize metadata and themes.

copyright_policy: Use titles, labels, dates, and relation metadata only; no lyrics or long quoted text.
not_to_infer: Do not treat metadata presence as cultural importance.
Do not generate final public answers from this card until reviewed.
